data.name: Description
data.value: GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.

data.name: AnnotationsOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable GitHub Actions annotations for failed and skipped tests. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: AnnotationTitle
data.value: Test failed: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the fully qualified test name.

data.name: SkippedAnnotationTitle
data.value: Test skipped: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the fully qualified test name.

data.name: NoFailureMessageFallback
data.value: The test failed without providing a failure message.

data.name: NoSkipReasonFallback
data.value: The test was skipped without providing a reason.

data.name: StepSummaryOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable writing a markdown job summary to the GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY file. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: StepSummaryWriteFailedWarning
data.value: Failed to write the GitHub Actions job summary to '{0}': {1}
data.comment: {0} is the file path, {1} is the error message.

data.name: SlowTestNoticesOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable GitHub Actions slow-test notices. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: SlowTestThresholdOptionDescription
data.value: The duration a test may run before a GitHub Actions slow-test notice is emitted. Accepts a bare number of seconds or a value with a unit suffix such as '90s', '2m', or '1.5h'. Defaults to 60s.

data.name: SlowTestNoticeTitle
data.value: Slow test: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the fully qualified test name.

data.name: SlowTestStillRunning
data.value: {0} still running after {1}s
data.comment: {0} is the fully qualified test name, {1} is the elapsed seconds.

data.name: InvalidSlowTestThreshold
data.value: Invalid value '{0}'. The slow-test threshold must be a positive duration, e.g. '60', '90s', or '2m'.

data.name: DisplayName
data.value: GitHub Actions report generator

data.name: GroupTitle
data.comment: {0} is the assembly name, {1} is the target framework moniker.

data.name: GroupsOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable per-assembly log groups. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: InvalidOnOffValue
data.value: Invalid value '{0}'. Valid values are 'on' (or 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (or 'false', 'disable', '0').

data.name: OptionDescription
data.value: Enable GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.

data.name: ExitCodeCallout
data.value: Exit code {0} — {1}: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the numeric exit code, {1} is the exit code name (not localized), {2} is the reason. Rendered as a callout in the job summary.

data.name: ExitCodeAnnotationTitle
data.value: Test run failed (exit code {0}: {1})
data.comment: {0} is the numeric exit code, {1} is the exit code name (not localized).

data.name: ExitCodeReasonSuccess
data.value: The test run succeeded.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonGenericFailure
data.value: The test run failed.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonAtLeastOneTestFailed
data.value: At least one test failed.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonTestSessionAborted
data.value: The test session was aborted.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonInvalidPlatformSetup
data.value: The test platform setup is invalid.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonInvalidCommandLine
data.value: The command line arguments are invalid.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonTestHostProcessExitedNonGracefully
data.value: The test host process exited non-gracefully.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonZeroTests
data.value: No tests were found to run. This often means a test filter matched nothing.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonMinimumExpectedTestsPolicyViolation
data.value: Fewer tests ran than required by --minimum-expected-tests.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonTestAdapterTestSessionFailure
data.value: The test adapter reported a test session failure.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonDependentProcessExited
data.value: A dependent process exited unexpectedly.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonIncompatibleProtocolVersion
data.value: An incompatible protocol version was negotiated.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonTestExecutionStoppedForMaxFailedTests
data.value: Test execution stopped after reaching the limit set by --maximum-failed-tests.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonCoverageThresholdFailed
data.value: One or more code coverage thresholds were not met.

data.name: ExitCodeReasonUnknown
data.value: The test run reported a non-success exit code.
